title: Deathly Hallows
description: Witchery addon with Thaumcraft and Botania implementations. More dark arts, Elf class, delicious magic food and many more!
body:
**Witchery required! Thaumcraft and Botania optional.**
Gameplay trailer:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MbYSuSMaAg0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

What my addon does:
Adds 3 deathly hallows-**Elder Wand, Resurrection Stone, Invisibility Mantle** which you can get from a new boss **Absolute Death**.
Also adds **Elf** class, Monster Book of Monsters, magic Food, Deadly Prism and has Thaumcraft and Botania integrations.

**Elder Wand**-allows to cast any spell just by pressing any button you want and has 8 additional spells.
Spells:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Anima Interitus**-sets your enemy in rotten dark chains that eats their soul and tear it out of the body. They need just 1 minute for that, after the soul has already been torn out, your enemy instantly dies. Chains bound you and your enemy bodies to a little area around that none of you can escape. The only way to break free is murdering such a cruel dark mage who dared to cast such an unforgivable spell on you.
Horcrux-decreases max hp by 10 and gives 1 resurrection. You can stack that spell while your max hp is higher than 10, all stacks nullifies after re-logging. After death or re-logging you will recieve you health back.
**Sectumsepra**-decreases enemies max hp by 15% per shot from current max hp for 33 seconds. After that time or death max hp will come back.
**Lumos Tempestas**-big area spell that deals magic damage to 6 targets.
**Bombarda Maxima**-creates explosion right in front of you and deals a lot of explosion damage.

**Leonardo 1-4 urn**-as it says, missels all your potions from Leonardo's urn.

**Decaimiento de la fuerza**-nullifies all benefit potion effects from all in some area around you.
**Graviole**-creates an area with magnificently strong gravitation zone, that turns off flight and deals a lot of fall damage.
**Elf lvls** are giving a lot of sweet buffs to all of these spells, for each lvl +10% area, +100% damage, -5% cost, and even additional number of enemies for Anima Interitus and Lumos Tempestas(each enemy 
will cost you additional Infusion).

</details>


**Invisibility Mantle**-allows you to become invisible and fly through blocks in ghost form.

 

**Resurrection Stone**-can save you up to 3 times from death and in cost of 1 resurrection can find coordinates of any player on the server.

 

**Monster Book of Monsters**-deals 2 absolute damage, but damage will increase by 0.5 for each achievement you get!

 

**Thaumcraft integration:**

**Multipolygonal Vis Reassembler:**

Place on the Altar to get maximum base energy and energy regen! (doesn't affect energy multiplier)
Bonus: 
+10 to base energy for each santi vis in nearest aura and +1x energy regen for each 10 santi vis (santi vis is how many aspects remains after awakening node, for ex. 120 aer became 4 santi vis)
Place on magic workbench to get 10 vis per sec for your wand in cost of 100 energy

![Generating Vis to wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb8a54f569b9d155de5f42b8d5836db4c5618fb1.png)
![Finally fitable size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e6485e26cbf3666b4d24244994529bd3af676ad.png)

**Inferiois Mutandis:**
![This thing is a banger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbc3de944fd22c77edbf17d9c3dcc201aa2e9879.png)

Wand focus that works like Mutandis or Mutating Sprig. Has secret craft(hint is in tooltip and texture) and one more secret functional that allows to turn some items that bound with it's past into Mutandis.
 

**Botania Integration:**

**Screamily:**

Generates 10k base mana*multiplier once per 10 seconds. Overgrowth seed and each screaming banshee gives +1 multiplier, maximum multiplier 16x; 
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8983fdc315d45647ccf78ec7a7476ee1d596fc73.png)
![scream!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37a432729c8b10c1c2379dd8f1497ea1afedb108.png)

**Spawnlesia:**

Each 10 seconds spawns absolute random entity of modpack with cost of 10 million mana.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd88be61e4db5a035f4ae7cc0d4c71039b9a869f.png)
![epic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/159ac23d5d8a61ab53dac112a638e6c3fd906231.png)

**Absolute Death** can be summoned through ,,Ritual of Gloomy Rebirth,, that is described in the witchery book. Has unique damage reduction, the more damage you deal, the more damage it absorbs. Each hit gives +10% damage reduction to damage you deal to maximum of 100%. That means that you can only hit 10 times with the same type of damage. If Death has 8 stacks of damage immunity it will spend all of them for special attack and they will be removed. After all damage reductions it has 50 damage cup and 2000 max hp. Also it deals ,,adaptive,, damage that changes every time until hurts you.

 

**Elf**-has a lot of bonuses and hard achieve system:
Getting a level: command ,,/deathlyhallows elf,, will help you track your progress!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Level 1: Secret condition(bound with infusion)
Level 2: Gain wisdom (1000 lvl of experience)
Level 3: Comprehend the secrets of the abyss (get on the y -1000 and below)
Level 4: Become a skilled enchanter (have items in the inventory for 1k lvls enchanted in total)
Level 5: Hone shooting skills (kill 1k monsters with a bow)
Level 6: Get used to vegetarian therapeutic nutrition (eat a stack of enchanted golden apples)
Level 7: Harden body(live 1k seconds with 10 debuffs)
Level 8: Learn the secrets of the afterlife(live 1k seconds in astral/ghost form)
Level 9: Healthy body healthy mind(consume 100 different items, it can be food, potions...)
Level 10: Develop magical kinship to the maximum (use my new spells 1k times)

</details>

**Lvl bonuses:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

From level 1:
Excellent Hunter: Shooting with a bow, you deal 10% more damage for each level
Innate Affinity with Magic: Infusion regeneration every 5 seconds to the current elf level, magic damage resistance 90%
Bad Fighter: any damage inflicted, except arrow damage, will be reduced by 95%, any damage received, except magic damage, will be increased by 2 times
Centenarian: while in the outside world, gets +4 to max hp and increases for each level
Self-importance: despises werewolves and vampires
From level 3:
Well-aimed Wound: All arrow damage turns into magic
From level 6:
The Art of War: When an arrow hits an enemy, damage will be inflicted to all surrounding mobs within a radius of 16 blocks in the amount of 30% of the damage inflicted
From level 7:
As long as there is an item in your hands that can shoot, you get a 75% chance to dodge and not take damage
From level 9:
Art of War: Radius and damage% increase by 2 times
Hatred of strangers: Deals x10 damage against vampires and werewolves, making them vulnerable to your damage, prohibits the vampire from being resurrected and drains his blood. 

if vampire or werewolf has less then 10% of max hp they will be instantly killed.
From level 10:
The maximum supply of infusion has been increased from 200 to 400

</details>

**Disbecoming an elf:** (only at night)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9da1731c64391b47fd23db8f01e90df036147c5.png)

**Deadly Prism**-can deal any amount of any DamageSource to you. RMB-damage,LMB-switch type,LMB+shift-type amount in chat (only for creative mode).

 

Also my mod adds commands:
,,/deathlyhallows damagelog,, allows you to see how much damage you got and absorbed or how much damage you dealt.

,,/deathlyhallows getid,, to get information about item you holding(it's class, id name and damage)

,,/deathlyhallows getnbt,, to get information about tile block you watching(it's class, id name and nbt list) 

,,/deathlyhallows elf,, to track your elf lvl progression

[My discord channel](https://discord.gg/fMdb7HYgE7)
